title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: High-velocity air-fuel (HVAF) spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that still retain martensitic transformation and shape-memory functionality after annealing.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables functional NiTi coatings on steel components for adaptive surface protection, actuation, and wear-resistant smart surfaces.
method: HVAF-sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four process parameter sets
Characterized composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation, and thermomechanical response
Post-annealing was used to recover/activate shape-memory behavior in the coatings
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were evaluated by microscopy and phase/functional tests, and they showed martensitic transformation plus thermal actuation in 3-point bending and shape-memory response in nanoindentation and scratch tests.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings were microstructurally inhomogeneous with voids, oxides, and internal stress, so annealing and process control are critical to achieve reliable performance.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：微观组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护方面的性能，已经是标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层还具有源于独特功能性热机械特性的额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直很困难。常规电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最常用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀、且不发生马氏体相变的涂层；冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合性差的问题。在本工作中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其既表现出功能性热机械特性，又与基体具有非常良好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上使用四组不同的工艺参数制备了NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、微观组织、相变以及功能性热机械特性进行了评估。尽管这些涂层包含不均匀的微观组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械加载过程中仍发生马氏体相变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要通过退火才能表现出功能性热机械特性。尽管其拉伸强度有限，这些涂层在三点弯曲测试中表现出热致驱动，在纳米压痕和划痕测试中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: 高速空气燃料（HVAF）喷涂可以制备厚NiTi涂层，且在退火后仍保留马氏体相变与形状记忆功能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得钢制构件上可实现功能性NiTi涂层，用于自适应表面防护、驱动以及耐磨智能表面。
method: 采用HVAF喷涂，在低碳钢上使用四组工艺参数制备NiTi涂层
表征成分、孔隙率、微观组织、相变和热机械响应
通过后续退火恢复/激活涂层的形状记忆行为
infographic.evidence_signal: 通过显微观察以及相变/功能测试对涂层进行评估，结果显示其发生了马氏体相变，并在三点弯曲中表现出热致驱动，在纳米压痕和划痕测试中表现出形状记忆响应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层在微观组织上不均匀，存在孔洞、氧化物和内应力，因此退火和工艺控制对于获得可靠性能至关重要。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet combines physics-informed self-supervision with few-shot prototypical learning to predict laser-weld penetration accurately from very limited labeled images.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This could reduce labeling cost and speed deployment of intelligent quality control for laser welding in industrial production.
method: Use PINN-guided contrastive learning on large unlabeled weld images to extract physically meaningful molten-pool/keyhole features.
Apply image augmentations to improve robustness and generalization.
Classify penetration state with prototypical networks using only a small labeled set.
infographic.evidence_signal: The model achieved 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, and was reported comparable to fully supervised baselines.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality of unlabeled data, the validity of embedded physical priors, and transferability to different welding setups or materials.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于使用物理信息神经网络的自监督学习的激光焊接过程焊透预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全焊透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测焊透状态对于确保焊缝质量是必不可少的。为此，本文提出了 SimPhysNet，一种新型算法，仅使用有限数量的标注图像即可在激光焊接焊透预测中实现较高的分类准确率。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；这类算法由于依赖大量高质量标注数据，在工业应用中受到制约。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型被引导从大量未标注数据中提取熔池和匙孔的物理有意义特征，同时三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的小样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像构建类别表征，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，与使用整个标注数据集的传统监督学习算法的性能相当。本文提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将物理信息自监督与小样本原型学习相结合，仅凭极少量标注图像即可准确预测激光焊接焊透。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这可以降低标注成本，并加速智能质量控制在激光焊接工业生产中的部署。
method: 在大规模未标注焊接图像上使用 PINN 引导的对比学习提取具有物理意义的熔池/匙孔特征。
应用图像增强以提高鲁棒性和泛化能力。
仅使用小规模标注集，通过原型网络对焊透状态进行分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集的 5%）就实现了 96.06% 的分类准确率，并据报道与完全监督基线相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于未标注数据的质量、所嵌入物理先验的有效性，以及其向不同焊接设备或材料条件的可迁移性。

title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene
authors: A. Alhourani, I. Barsoum, J. Sheikh-Ahmad, S. Deveci
abstract: Friction stir welding (FSW) has gained recognition as an effective technique for joining thermoplastic materials. This study presents a comprehensive investigation to predict FSW characteristics such as weld temperatures, vertical axial forces, material flow and defect formation in FSW of high-density polyethylene (HDPE) using both computational and machine learning approaches, validated by experimental results. A three-dimensional Coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) numerical model is developed to simulate the HDPE welding process under varying process parameters of rotational and welding speeds, and bottom preheating conditions. The CEL numerical model is validated against experimental data, showing markedly good agreement in predicting void formation, thermal and mechanical responses. Results indicate that preheating the bottom surface proved effective in reducing thermal gradients and stabilizing vertical force fluctuations. Quantitatively, bottom-surface preheating at 60 °C reduced peak plunge force from 1600 N close to 1100 N and raised peak temperatures from 70 °C (without preheat) to about 100 °C, hence smoothing through-thickness gradients and stabilizing the axial force distribution. In parallel, two multilayer perceptron artificial neural networks (ANNs) are trained on experimental data to predict temporal temperature and axial force responses with R2 between 0.91 and 0.99, demonstrating high accuracy and strong generalization across the tested FSW parameter space. The computational CEL simulations accurately predicted weld zone morphology, including stir zone, thermo-mechanically affected zone and heat-affected zone, however the combined CEL–ANN framework enables rapid generation of process maps that highlights defective and defect-free welding windows, with optimal conditions obtained at 1500 rpm and 30 mm/min with 60 °C preheating, and poor weldability observed at 1000 rpm without preheating due to wormhole formation. These findings provide process-driven design guidelines for developing robust HDPE joints and demonstrate how integrating computational modeling with machine learning enables efficient optimization, offering valuable insights into the key characteristics of the FSW process in thermoplastics and supporting its broader adoption in industrial applications.

infographic.key_insight: A coupled CEL simulation plus neural-network surrogate can accurately predict friction stir welding quality in HDPE and identify process windows that reduce defects.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study gives practical weld-setting guidance for thermoplastic joining, showing that bottom preheating and tuned speed combinations can stabilize forces and improve joint integrity.
method: 3D coupled Eulerian-Lagrangian (CEL) model of HDPE FSW under varying rotation speed, travel speed, and bottom preheating
Two multilayer perceptron ANNs trained on experimental time-series to predict temperature and axial force
Validation against experimental weld morphology, thermal response, and force measurements
infographic.evidence_signal: The ANN models achieved strong predictive performance with R2 values of 0.91 to 0.99, while the CEL model matched observed void formation and thermo-mechanical behavior.
infographic.watch_item: The reported process map is based on a limited experimental parameter space, so broader material grades, tool designs, and scaling effects may require retraining or revalidation.
infographic.paper_title: Computational and machine learning modelling approaches for weld quality predictions in friction stir welding of high-density polyethylene

zh-Hans.title: 用于高密度聚乙烯搅拌摩擦焊焊接质量预测的计算与机器学习建模方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 搅拌摩擦焊（FSW）已被认为是一种连接热塑性材料的有效技术。本研究结合计算方法和机器学习方法，对高密度聚乙烯（HDPE）搅拌摩擦焊中的焊缝温度、竖向轴向力、材料流动和缺陷形成等FSW特征进行了全面研究，并通过实验结果进行了验证。建立了三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）数值模型，用于在不同工艺参数（转速、焊接速度和底部预热条件）下模拟HDPE焊接过程。CEL数值模型与实验数据进行了对比验证，在预测孔洞形成、热响应和机械响应方面表现出显著良好的一致性。结果表明，对底表面进行预热可有效减小热梯度并稳定竖向力波动。定量而言，底表面在60 °C预热时，最大下压力由接近1600 N降至约1100 N，峰值温度由70 °C（无预热）升至约100 °C，从而平缓了厚度方向梯度并稳定了轴向力分布。与此同时，基于实验数据训练了两个多层感知机人工神经网络（ANN），用于预测时间温度和轴向力响应，R2介于0.91至0.99之间，表明其在所测试的FSW参数空间内具有较高精度和较强泛化能力。计算CEL仿真能够准确预测焊缝区形貌，包括搅拌区、热-力影响区和热影响区；同时，组合CEL–ANN框架能够快速生成工艺图谱，标示有缺陷和无缺陷的焊接窗口。最佳条件为1500 rpm和30 mm/min，并配合60 °C预热；而在1000 rpm且无预热条件下，由于形成虫洞缺陷而表现出较差的焊接性。这些结果为开发稳健的HDPE接头提供了以工艺为导向的设计准则，并表明将计算建模与机器学习相结合能够实现高效优化，为理解热塑性材料FSW过程的关键特征提供了有价值的见解，并支持其在工业应用中的更广泛采用。

infographic.key_insight: 耦合CEL仿真与神经网络代理模型可准确预测HDPE搅拌摩擦焊质量，并识别可减少缺陷的工艺窗口。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究为热塑性材料连接提供了实用的焊接参数指导，表明底部预热和优化的速度组合可稳定力响应并提高接头完整性。
method: 在不同转速、行进速度和底部预热条件下建立HDPE搅拌摩擦焊的三维耦合欧拉-拉格朗日（CEL）模型
基于实验时间序列训练两个多层感知机ANN，以预测温度和轴向力
通过实验焊缝形貌、热响应和力测量对模型进行验证
infographic.evidence_signal: ANN模型取得了0.91至0.99的R2值，表现出较强的预测能力；CEL模型与观测到的孔洞形成和热-机械行为一致。
infographic.watch_item: 所报告的工艺图谱基于有限的实验参数空间，因此更广泛的材料牌号、工具设计和尺度效应可能需要重新训练或重新验证。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep learning model can jointly predict laser welding penetration state, penetration depth, and weld seam morphology from weld pool images and process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables in-situ quality control for laser penetration welding by turning camera-based monitoring into actionable defect and geometry predictions during manufacturing.
method: Uses CMOS camera images of the top weld pool plus welding parameters as inputs.
Combines convolutional neural networks with state-space models to capture spatial and temporal welding features.
Employs a carefully constructed dataset to improve robustness and generalization.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% accuracy for weld cross-section reconstruction.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the captured weld-pool dataset, so transfer to new materials, optics, or welding regimes should be validated carefully.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光深熔焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在确定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文全面介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。该监测平台依赖于在激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝横截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光深熔焊接系统中的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 一种多任务时空深度学习模型可以基于熔池图像和工艺参数，联合预测激光焊接熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得激光深熔焊接能够实现原位质量控制，将基于相机的监测转化为制造过程中可用于缺陷和几何形貌预测的可执行信息。
method: 使用CMOS相机采集的顶部熔池图像及焊接参数作为输入。
将卷积神经网络与状态空间模型相结合，以捕获焊接的空间和时间特征。
采用精心构建的数据集以提高鲁棒性和泛化能力。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的熔深状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差，以及95.65%的焊缝横截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于所采集熔池数据集的质量和代表性，因此在向新材料、光学系统或焊接工况迁移时应谨慎验证。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning plus hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász optimization makes BiSeNetV2 much more robust to reflective weld seams without adding model complexity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical real-time perception upgrade for autonomous welding robots operating on shiny, low-contrast construction surfaces.
method: Fine-tuned a BiSeNetV2 backbone with transfer learning.
Used a hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss to stabilize learning on thin seam boundaries.
Compared against BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer under reflective conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline while keeping FLOPs, parameters, and inference speed unchanged.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are shown on the reported dataset and conditions, so deployment may still need site-specific validation for new metals, lighting, and camera setups.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强用于施工自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：应对双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 在自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要；然而，在施工场景中，恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄焊缝几何形态常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出一种抗反射焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失函数增强 BiSeNetV2 主干网络。该框架并未增加网络结构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法取得了 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在保持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度完全相同的情况下，相比基于 OHEM 的基线，Joint IoU 提升了 +22.36 个百分点。该方法在反射条件下还恢复了 96.33% 的严重零 IoU 失败案例。针对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，所提出的优化策略对轻量级实时分割架构尤其有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为涉及反射性金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量级的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 迁移学习加混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 优化，使 BiSeNetV2 在不增加模型复杂度的情况下，对反射性焊缝的鲁棒性显著提升。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在光亮、低对比度施工表面上运行的自主焊接机器人提供了一种实用的实时感知升级方案。
method: 采用迁移学习对 BiSeNetV2 主干网络进行微调。
使用混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失函数，以稳定细窄焊缝边界上的学习过程。
在反射条件下与 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 进行比较。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法达到 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在保持 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度不变的情况下，相比 OHEM 基线将 Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升是在所报告的数据集和条件下得到的，因此在新金属材料、光照条件和相机配置下部署时，仍可能需要进行针对具体场景的验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration prediction across fundamentally different welding processes without requiring new labels.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This improves intelligent welding monitoring by reducing relabeling effort and enabling robust deployment from TIG to laser welding and vice versa.
method: Train a UDA model for penetration-state classification across source and target welding domains
Use gradual source domain expansion to stabilize transfer under large process shifts
Validate feature alignment with UMAP visualization of domain-invariant, class-separable embeddings
infographic.evidence_signal: The approach achieved 90.65% and 90.72% average accuracy in same-process tests, and 80.48% TIG-to-laser plus 81.13% laser-to-TIG in cross-process transfer, outperforming the supervised baseline by about 35.8% to 43.4%.
infographic.watch_item: Cross-process deployment still depends on target-process data availability during adaptation, so performance may vary if the target welding conditions differ beyond the studied datasets.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光和TIG焊接中无监督域适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机制的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊，其性能往往会因域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一局限，我们提出一种结合渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督域适应（UDA）框架。基于专门构建的TIG和激光焊接数据集进行评估后，我们的方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，其在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较有监督基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，从TIG到Laser的准确率达到80.48%，从Laser到TIG的准确率达到81.13%，分别较基线提升43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持类别判别边界的同时学习到了域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重新标注成本，并增强了智能监测在不同焊接系统中的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督域适应框架，可以在无需新标签的情况下，将焊缝熔深预测迁移到本质不同的焊接工艺之间。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这通过减少重新标注工作量并支持从TIG到激光焊及其逆向的稳健部署，提升了智能焊接监测能力。
method: 训练一个用于源域与目标焊接域之间熔深状态分类的UDA模型
采用渐进式源域扩展，在大幅工艺变化下稳定迁移过程
通过UMAP可视化对具有域不变性且类别可分的嵌入进行验证
infographic.evidence_signal: 该方法在同工艺测试中分别实现了90.65%和90.72%的平均准确率，在跨工艺迁移中分别实现了TIG到激光的80.48%和激光到TIG的81.13%，较有监督基线提升约35.8%至43.4%。
infographic.watch_item: 跨工艺部署仍依赖自适应过程中目标工艺数据的可获得性，因此如果目标焊接条件超出所研究的数据集范围，性能可能会发生变化。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: D-gun applied Al2O3-TiO2 coating significantly improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V, and random forest gives the most accurate wear prediction among the tested machine learning models.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This supports using detonation-sprayed ceramic coatings to extend the service life of titanium components in aerospace, biomedical, and marine tribological applications.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3-TiO2 coating on Ti-6Al-4V using D-gun processing.
Evaluated wear with ASTM G99 pin-on-disc tests against EN31 steel under 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: Experimental wear tests and SEM observations showed reduced wear and protective tribo-layer formation on coated surfaces, while random forest achieved the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error.
infographic.watch_item: The ML models are based on a limited set of test conditions, so prediction reliability may drop outside the studied load, speed, and time ranges.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋领域。本研究采用实验和机器学习方法，考察了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH、乙炔：2150 SLPH、喷距：180 mm、粒子速度约 1200 m/s），通过爆轰枪（D-gun）工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 合金表面制备了厚度约 200 µm 的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘试验装置测试样品的磨损行为。试验条件为法向载荷 40–100 N、滑动速度 100–200 rpm、持续时间 20–40 min，对偶材料为 EN31 钢。扫描电子显微镜结果表明，涂层表面的磨损降低，并形成了保护性的摩擦层。基于滑动参数，建立了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型来预测磨损。随机森林因平均百分误差和均方误差更低而被证明是最佳选择。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun 制备的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层显著提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性，在所测试的机器学习模型中，随机森林的磨损预测最准确。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明，可采用爆轰喷涂陶瓷涂层来延长航空航天、生物医学和海洋摩擦学应用中钛部件的服役寿命。
method: 使用 D-gun 工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 上制备约 200 µm 厚的 Al2O3-TiO2 涂层。
按照 ASTM G99 标准，采用销-盘试验在 EN31 钢对偶材料上评估磨损，条件为 40–100 N、100–200 rpm 和 20–40 min。
建立 ANN、KNN 和随机森林模型，根据滑动参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 实验磨损测试和 SEM 观察表明，涂层表面磨损降低并形成了保护性摩擦层；同时，随机森林获得了最低的平均百分误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 这些机器学习模型基于有限的测试条件，因此在超出所研究的载荷、速度和时间范围时，预测可靠性可能下降。

title: Hot corrosion behavior of thermal sprayed using HVAF and DS techniques with Tribaloy-400 coatings for solar energy storage container
authors: P. Sakthivel, G. Sivakumar, M. Manikandan
abstract: The present study investigates the high-temperature corrosion behaviour of Tribaloy-400 (T-400) coatings deposited on ASTM A516 steel using two thermal spray techniques: (i) High Velocity Air Fuel (HVAF) spraying and (ii) Detonation Spraying (DS). The coated specimens were exposed to a molten solar salt environment consisting of 60% NaNO 3 –40% KNO 3 at 500 °C for exposure durations up to 1000 hours to evaluate their oxidation and corrosion resistance. Phase analysis indicated the formation of stable protective oxide phases, including Cr 2 O 3 , Co 3 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , in both coating systems. Elemental mapping revealed that the HVAF coating retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal molten salt penetration even after prolonged exposure of 1000 hours. In contrast, the DS coating exhibited comparatively deeper salt ingress into the coating microstructure, which contributed to increased degradation and spallation. SEM observations showed that the HVAF coatings possessed a dense and well-bonded microstructure, along with the formation of thermodynamically stable oxides such as Cr 2 O 3 , CoCr 2 O 4 , and CoMoO 4 , resulting in superior resistance to molten salt-induced corrosion. However, the relatively porous nature of the DS coating promoted salt-assisted oxide dissolution, leading to higher mass gain, increased spallation, and accelerated degradation during extended exposure. Comparative evaluation of both coating techniques was carried out to identify a suitable coating process and feedstock combination for high-temperature CSP applications.
venue: Journal of Materials Research and Technology

infographic.key_insight: HVAF-sprayed Tribaloy-400 forms a denser, more protective oxide layer than detonation-sprayed T-400, giving better resistance to molten solar-salt corrosion at 500 °C.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For concentrated solar power thermal-storage containers, HVAF coating appears more suitable than DS when long-term high-temperature salt exposure and coating durability are critical.
method: Deposited Tribaloy-400 on ASTM A516 steel using HVAF and detonation spraying.
Exposed coated samples to 60% NaNO3–40% KNO3 molten solar salt at 500 °C for up to 1000 h.
Compared phase evolution, elemental mapping, SEM microstructure, mass gain, and spallation behavior.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that HVAF retained a uniform Cr–Mo–Si–O enriched surface with minimal salt penetration after 1000 h, while DS showed deeper ingress, higher mass gain, and more spallation.
infographic.watch_item: Performance is demonstrated under one salt chemistry and temperature, so coating selection may change with different CSP operating conditions or thermal cycling.
infographic.paper_title: Hot corrosion behavior of thermal sprayed using HVAF and DS techniques with Tribaloy-400 coatings for solar energy storage container

zh-Hans.title: 采用HVAF和DS技术喷涂Tribaloy-400涂层用于太阳能储能容器的热腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了采用两种热喷涂技术——(i) 高速空气燃料喷涂（HVAF）和(ii) 爆炸喷涂（DS）——沉积于ASTM A516钢上的Tribaloy-400（T-400）涂层的高温腐蚀行为。将涂覆试样暴露于由60% NaNO3–40% KNO3组成的熔融太阳盐环境中，在500 °C下进行最长达1000小时的暴露，以评估其抗氧化和耐腐蚀性能。相分析表明，两种涂层体系中均形成了稳定的保护性氧化物相，包括Cr2O3、Co3O4和CoMoO4。元素分布映射显示，即使在1000小时长时间暴露后，HVAF涂层仍保持均匀的Cr–Mo–Si–O富集表面，且熔盐渗透极少。相比之下，DS涂层表现出相对更深的盐侵入涂层微观结构，这促成了更严重的退化和剥落。SEM观察表明，HVAF涂层具有致密且结合良好的微观结构，并形成了热力学稳定氧化物，如Cr2O3、CoCr2O4和CoMoO4，从而表现出优异的抗熔盐诱导腐蚀性能。然而，DS涂层相对多孔的特性促进了盐辅助氧化物溶解，导致更高的增重、更多的剥落以及在长时间暴露过程中的更快退化。对两种涂层技术进行了比较评估，以确定适用于高温CSP应用的合适涂层工艺与喷涂材料组合。

infographic.key_insight: 与爆炸喷涂的T-400相比，HVAF喷涂的Tribaloy-400形成更致密、保护性更强的氧化层，因此在500 °C下对熔融太阳盐腐蚀具有更好的耐受性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于集中式太阳能发电热储能容器，在长期高温盐暴露和涂层耐久性至关重要时，HVAF涂层似乎比DS更适合。
method: 使用HVAF和爆炸喷涂将Tribaloy-400沉积到ASTM A516钢上。
将涂覆样品暴露于60% NaNO3–40% KNO3熔融太阳盐中，在500 °C下最长1000 h。
比较相演化、元素分布映射、SEM微观结构、增重和剥落行为。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告指出，HVAF在1000 h后仍保持均匀的Cr–Mo–Si–O富集表面且盐渗透极少，而DS则表现出更深的侵入、更高的增重和更多的剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 该性能仅在一种盐化学组成和一种温度下得到证明，因此在不同CSP运行条件或热循环下，涂层选择可能会发生变化。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba uses physics-guided spatiotemporal state-space modeling to predict future weld-pool regions from past images, process signals, and wire-state data for lookahead segmentation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: By anticipating molten pool, keyhole, and wire geometry up to 500 ms ahead, the method can support lower-latency closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding.
method: Fuses coaxial grayscale video with welding parameters and aligned electrical signals.
Uses patch-level temporal state-space modeling plus horizon-conditioned latent prediction to forecast future features.
Adds motion-aware decoding and auxiliary geometric losses (SDF, temporal consistency, distillation) to sharpen region boundaries.
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead, with ablations showing temporal history, patch-level state-space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness were most important.
infographic.watch_item: The approach depends on tightly aligned multimodal sensing and may be sensitive to domain shift, synchronization errors, or missing signals in real welding setups.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于激光送丝焊接前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光送丝焊接中，实时焊池感知对于闭环控制至关重要，而传感、计算和执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的线材状态电信号，预测三类具有物理意义区域的未来语义布局：小孔、线材和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、工艺与传感器条件化特征归一化、补丁级时序状态空间建模、与预测时域条件化的潜在表征预测、密集未来特征预测以及运动感知掩码解码器。辅助的符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏和细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测的几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 WeldMamba 在500 ms前瞻条件下达到了74.63% mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现稳健未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba 利用物理引导的时空状态空间建模，从过去的图像、工艺信号和线材状态数据中预测未来焊池区域，用于前瞻分割。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 通过提前500 ms预测熔池、小孔和线材几何形状，该方法可支持激光送丝焊接中更低时延的闭环控制。
method: 融合同轴灰度视频与焊接参数及对齐的电信号。
采用补丁级时序状态空间建模和与预测时域条件化的潜在表征预测来预测未来特征。
加入运动感知解码以及辅助几何损失（SDF、时间一致性、蒸馏）以锐化区域边界。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms前瞻条件下取得了74.63% mIoU，消融结果显示时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模和小孔运动感知最为重要。
infographic.watch_item: 该方法依赖紧密对齐的多模态传感，在真实焊接系统中可能对域偏移、同步误差或信号缺失较为敏感。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% made detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings denser and more wear-resistant, though with a slightly higher friction coefficient.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing barrel filling ratio is a practical process lever for improving coating integrity and tribological durability in severe wear and high-temperature components.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at 43% and 53% barrel filling ratios under identical conditions.
Compared microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and X-ray diffraction.
Evaluated dry sliding wear with ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% coating showed reduced porosity and achieved a minimum wear rate of 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N) under the tested conditions.
infographic.watch_item: The improved wear resistance at 53% came with higher friction, so application tradeoffs should be checked under the target load and speed regime.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 桶装填充比对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了桶装填充比对爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层微观组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在43%和53%的桶装填充比下制备涂层。微观组织表征显示，涂层形成了致密的层状结构，孔隙率低，Cr3C2碳化物颗粒在NiCr金属基体中分布均匀。与43%桶装填充比下制备的涂层相比，53%桶装填充比下制备的涂层表现出更致密的微观组织。X射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后Cr3C2和NiCr仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，生成了少量Cr7C3。摩擦学性能在干滑动条件下采用球-盘配置进行评估，法向载荷为10和15 N，滑动速度为5和10 cm/s。磨损体积根据试验后磨痕几何形貌测定，并据此计算磨损率。53%桶装填充比制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数较高。最小磨损率达到1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与涂层孔隙率降低和结构完整性增强有关。所得结果表明，优化爆炸喷涂参数会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的Cr3C2–NiCr涂层有望作为承受严苛摩擦和磨损条件部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将桶装填充比从43%提高到53%使爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层更加致密、耐磨性更好，但摩擦系数略有升高。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化桶装填充比是提升严苛磨损和高温部件中涂层完整性与摩擦学耐久性的一个实用工艺调节手段。
method: 在相同条件下，于43%和53%桶装填充比下制备爆炸喷涂Cr3C2–NiCr涂层。
采用显微镜和X射线衍射比较微观组织和相组成。
通过球-盘试验在10和15 N、5和10 cm/s条件下评估干滑动磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53%涂层孔隙率更低，并在所测试条件下实现了1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)的最小磨损率。
infographic.watch_item: 53%条件下更好的耐磨性伴随着更高的摩擦，因此应在目标载荷和速度范围内检查应用权衡。

title: Layer-by-layer coating of electrosprayed Bacillus coagulans using niosomes and casein/gum arabic complexes induced by ultrasound and microwave-assisted interactions
authors: Davood Sheibanizadeh, Alireza Rahman, Lida Shahsavani Mojarad, Toktam Mostaghim, Touraj Rahimi
abstract: Probiotics are highly sensitive to adverse factors, so their use in many products is a serious challenge. This research aims to create layer-by-layer coatings based on niosomes and casein/gum arabic complexes to produce electrosprayed Bacillus coagulans nanoparticles. The complexes were first performed through ultrasonic pre-treatment and subsequently completed with a secondary microwave treatment (150, 350, and 550 W). The complexes formed at 350 W microwave power were validated by FTIR, revealing the highest degree of glycation and the maximum denaturation temperature (136.75 ± 1.57 °C). Nanoniosomes prepared with Span 20 and Tween 80 exhibited the highest encapsulation efficiency. Electrospraying solutions of casein/gum arabic loaded with probiotic nanoniosomes exhibited shear-thinning characteristics, with viscoelastic properties revealing that the G′ exceeded the G″. Following the electrospraying, solutions of 15% casein/gum arabic containing Span 20-based nanoniosomes (97.85 ± 1.64%) exhibited the highest viability. TEM confirmed the presence of a coated structure on the probiotics. The electrosprayed probiotic nanoniosomes formulated with Span 20 and the casein/gum arabic complex exhibited the highest viability. Developing multilayer coatings on B. coagulans , along with their nanocapsules produced by electrospray at ambient temperature, presents significant opportunities to enhance the stability and utility of probiotics in both food and pharmaceutical applications.
category: AI materials, welding, and machine design

infographic.key_insight: Ultrasound- and microwave-assisted casein/gum arabic complexes, combined with niosome encapsulation, created effective layer-by-layer electrosprayed coatings that protected Bacillus coagulans and maximized viability.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study shows a scalable ambient-temperature coating strategy for stabilizing sensitive bioactive particles, relevant to microencapsulation and advanced food/pharma processing workflows.
method: Ultrasonic pre-treatment followed by microwave-assisted glycation of casein/gum arabic at 150, 350, and 550 W
Preparation of Span 20- and Tween 80-based nanoniosomes to load Bacillus coagulans
Electrospraying of probiotic-loaded polymer solutions to form multilayer coated nanoparticles
infographic.evidence_signal: The 350 W complex gave the highest glycation and denaturation temperature, and 15% casein/gum arabic with Span 20 nanoniosomes achieved the highest post-electrospraying viability (97.85 ± 1.64%).
infographic.watch_item: Performance is formulation-sensitive, so the coating and viability gains may require careful control of microwave power, polymer concentration, and electrospraying conditions for scale-up.
infographic.paper_title: Layer-by-layer coating of electrosprayed Bacillus coagulans using niosomes and casein/gum arabic complexes induced by ultrasound and microwave-assisted interactions
infographic.paper_category: AI materials, welding, and machine design

zh-Hans.title: 利用超声和微波辅助相互作用诱导的豆乳球蛋白/阿拉伯胶复合物与niosomes对静电喷雾球菌 Bacillus coagulans 的逐层包覆
zh-Hans.abstract: 益生菌对不利因素高度敏感，因此其在许多产品中的应用面临严峻挑战。本研究旨在构建基于niosomes和酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶复合物的逐层包覆体系，以制备静电喷雾的 Bacillus coagulans 纳米颗粒。首先通过超声预处理形成复合物，随后进行二次微波处理（150、350 和 550 W）。在 350 W 微波功率下形成的复合物经 FTIR 验证，结果显示其糖基化程度最高，并具有最大的变性温度（136.75 ± 1.57 °C）。采用 Span 20 和 Tween 80 制备的纳米niosomes表现出最高的包封效率。负载益生菌纳米niosomes的酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶静电喷雾溶液呈现剪切变稀特性，其黏弹性结果表明 G′ 大于 G″。静电喷雾后，含有基于 Span 20 的纳米niosomes的 15% 酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶溶液表现出最高存活率（97.85 ± 1.64%）。TEM 证实益生菌表面存在包覆结构。由 Span 20 和酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶复合物制备的静电喷雾益生菌纳米niosomes表现出最高存活率。在 B. coagulans 上构建多层包覆层，并通过常温静电喷雾制备其纳米胶囊，为提升益生菌在食品和制药应用中的稳定性与实用性提供了重要机遇。

infographic.key_insight: 超声和微波辅助的酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶复合物与niosomes包封相结合，形成了有效的逐层静电喷雾包覆层，保护了 Bacillus coagulans 并最大化了存活率。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究展示了一种可放大、常温的包覆策略，可用于稳定敏感生物活性颗粒，与微胶囊化及先进食品/制药加工流程相关。
method: 对酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶进行超声预处理，随后在 150、350 和 550 W 下进行微波辅助糖基化
制备基于 Span 20 和 Tween 80 的纳米niosomes以负载 Bacillus coagulans
对负载益生菌的聚合物溶液进行静电喷雾，形成多层包覆纳米颗粒
infographic.evidence_signal: 350 W 复合物具有最高的糖基化程度和变性温度，而含 15% 酪蛋白/阿拉伯胶和 Span 20 纳米niosomes 的体系在静电喷雾后获得最高存活率（97.85 ± 1.64%）。
infographic.watch_item: 性能对配方高度敏感，因此在放大过程中可能需要对微波功率、聚合物浓度和静电喷雾条件进行严格控制，以获得包覆和存活率提升。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing cold-spray pressure from 30 to 60 bar raises copper particle velocity above the bonding threshold, producing denser, more ductile deposits with better conductivity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study identifies higher spray pressure as a practical control knob for balancing conductivity, ductility, and strength in copper CSAM parts.
method: LightSPEE3D cold spray copper deposits made at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar
Measured microstructure and phase evolution with XRD and SEM
Evaluated hardness, eddy-current conductivity, and tensile response
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports systematic increases in particle velocity, XRD-driven refinement and dislocation changes, higher conductivity, and a clear ductility gain at higher pressures, with fully ductile fracture at the best conditions.
infographic.watch_item: Higher pressure improved multifunctional performance, but hardness decreased due to recovery/recrystallisation, so process settings must be tuned to avoid trading away wear resistance.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 优化冷喷涂增材制造：压力驱动提升铜沉积层机械性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种固态工艺，能够在不发生熔化的情况下制备致密金属构件，因此在既要求电导率又要求机械完整性的铜应用中具有很强的吸引力。本研究采用 LightSPEE3D 系统，系统考察了 30 bar、40 bar、50 bar 和 60 bar 喷涂压力对冷喷涂铜颗粒速度、显微组织和性能的影响。通过 X 射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测试、拉伸评估和扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷涂沉积层进行了表征。结果表明，提高喷涂压力可使颗粒速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而改善颗粒间结合，并促进与严重塑性变形及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助的机制相一致的显微组织细化。XRD 分析表明，随压力升高，晶粒尺寸逐步细化、位错密度增加，这与延展性改善直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶，硬度有所下降，但电导率提高，可能源于颗粒间连续性增强以及界面不连续性减少。拉伸测试显示出明显的强-韧转变，高压力下的沉积层表现出显著提升的延展性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全延性断裂形貌。总体而言，研究结果确定了较高喷涂压力下的最佳工艺窗口，在该窗口内，铜冷喷涂沉积层可实现导电性、延展性和强度的均衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在控制 CSAM 铜部件中颗粒速度、动态再结晶与多功能性能相互作用方面的关键作用。本研究建立了一个工艺-结构-性能关系，将 LightSPEE3D CSAM 系统中的颗粒速度、基于 XRD 的显微组织演化、导电性和拉伸行为联系起来。

infographic.key_insight: 将冷喷涂压力从 30 提高到 60 bar 可使铜颗粒速度超过结合阈值，从而形成更致密、延展性更好且导电性更佳的沉积层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究将较高喷涂压力确定为一种可行的控制手段，用于平衡铜 CSAM 零件中的导电性、延展性和强度。
method: 使用 LightSPEE3D 冷喷涂制备 30、40、50 和 60 bar 条件下的铜沉积层
通过 XRD 和 SEM 测量显微组织和相演化
评估硬度、涡流电导率和拉伸响应
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了颗粒速度的系统性提高、基于 XRD 的细化和位错变化、电导率升高，以及在较高压力下延展性的明显改善；在最佳条件下呈现完全延性断裂。
infographic.watch_item: 较高压力提升了多功能性能，但由于回复/再结晶导致硬度下降，因此必须优化工艺参数，避免以牺牲耐磨性为代价。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Raising argon flow from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying produces thicker, denser NiCrFeBSiC coatings with better wear behavior.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Process gas tuning is a practical lever to improve coating build quality, hardness-related performance, and tribological life in thermal spray applications.
method: Air plasma sprayed self-fluxing NiCrFeBSiC metal-ceramic coatings at two argon flow rates: 1600 and 1800 L/h.
Compared structure, porosity, microhardness, elastic modulus, adhesion, and ball-on-disk friction/wear behavior.
Used scratch testing to assess coating-substrate adhesion and failure stability.
infographic.evidence_signal: At 1800 L/h, coating thickness increased by about 2×, porosity dropped by about 2×, and the friction coefficient decreased to approximately 0.107, with microhardness measured at 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV and elastic modulus at 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on only two argon flow settings, so broader process optimization is still needed before generalizing to other spray conditions.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对NiCrFeBSiC涂层结构和性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于NiCrFeBSiC体系的自熔性金属陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600和1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，氩气流量增加会使涂层厚度约增加两倍，并使孔隙率降低两倍。根据显微硬度测试结果，显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，而弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。采用球-盘配置进行了摩擦学测试。在氩气流量为1800 L/h时，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性有所提高。划痕测试结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工艺条件下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在1800 L/h下获得的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂过程中的氩气流量从1600提高到1800 L/h，可制备出更厚、更致密且耐磨行为更好的NiCrFeBSiC涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 工艺气体调控是改善热喷涂应用中涂层成形质量、与硬度相关性能及摩擦学寿命的实用手段。
method: 采用空气等离子喷涂，在两种氩气流量条件下制备自熔性NiCrFeBSiC金属陶瓷涂层：1600和1800 L/h。
比较了结构、孔隙率、显微硬度、弹性模量、结合强度以及球-盘摩擦/磨损行为。
使用划痕测试评估涂层-基体结合强度和失效稳定性。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在1800 L/h时，涂层厚度约增加2倍，孔隙率约降低2倍，摩擦系数降至约0.107；显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。
infographic.watch_item: 结果仅基于两种氩气流量设置，因此在推广到其他喷涂条件之前，仍需进一步进行更广泛的工艺优化。

title: A Comparative Analysis of Multitask Neural Networks and Stacking Ensemble Learning for Predicting UTS, Weld Hardness, and HAZ Hardness in Welding Applications
authors: Sama Mukhtar, Amit Sata, Gaurang Joshi, Durgesh Srivastava
abstract: Accurately predicting welding performance measures like ultimate strength (UTS), weld bead hardness, and HAZ mechanical hardness is crucial for ensuring the structural integrity and performance of welded components. Multitask learning (MTL) refers to a machine learning approach in which one model is designed to handle several interconnected tasks at the same time. Instead of training separate models for each task, MTL shares representations among tasks, allowing them to leverage common patterns while maintaining task-specific distinctions. In this study, we compared two advanced machine learning techniques, namely multitask neural network (MTNN) and stacking ensemble learning, for predicting these parameters based on a shared dataset. A multitask neural network (MTNN) is a specific type of multitask learning (MTL) model that uses a deep neural network architecture to handle multiple related tasks simultaneously. In MTNN, different tasks share some hidden layers while having task-specific output layers. This shared representation allows the model to learn common patterns across tasks while maintaining task-specific outputs. Both methods are evaluated using RMSE and R<sup>2</sup> to determine their predictive accuracy and overall effectiveness. It showed robust prediction strength, as its RMSE outcomes are 0.1288 for UTS, 0.0886 for weld hardness, and 0.1125 for HAZ hardness, whereas R<sup>2</sup> values are 0.6724, 0.9215, and 0.8407, respectively. This underlines that it can generalize well in interrelated tasks. Stacking ensemble learning outperformed MTL in the accuracy of individual tasks: the RMSE for UTS is 0.0263 and R<sup>2</sup> is 0.9863; for weld hardness, it is 0.0467 and 0.9782; and for HAZ hardness, it is 0.1109 and 0.8453. Such results indicate the good ability of ensemble methods to produce highly accurate, task-specific predictions. This comparison reveals the trade-offs between the two approaches. MTL is good in scenarios where the tasks are related and the data are sparse, giving efficient training and good generalization; stacking ensembles work better in the case of accurate, independent predictions. In both cases, they show remarkable potential for improving the predictive power of welding applications, making them suitable precursors to further investigation into hybrid models that bring the best features of both approaches together.

infographic.key_insight: Stacking ensemble learning delivered the strongest task-specific predictions for UTS, weld hardness, and HAZ hardness, while the multitask neural network offered solid shared-learning performance across related welding targets.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For welding process optimization, the results show that model choice should balance prediction accuracy against the benefit of shared learning when data are limited or tasks are strongly coupled.
method: Compared multitask neural network (shared hidden layers + task-specific outputs) with stacking ensemble learning.
Predicted three welding properties: UTS, weld hardness, and HAZ hardness.
Evaluated performance using RMSE and R².
infographic.evidence_signal: On the shared dataset, stacking achieved lower RMSE and higher R² for all three outputs, with especially strong gains for UTS and weld hardness, while MTNN remained competitive for HAZ hardness.
infographic.watch_item: The comparison is dataset-dependent, so stacking may overfit or generalize less well if the welding dataset is small, noisy, or shifted to new materials/process settings.
infographic.paper_title: A Comparative Analysis of Multitask Neural Networks and Stacking Ensemble Learning for Predicting UTS, Weld Hardness, and HAZ Hardness in Welding Applications

zh-Hans.title: 用于焊接应用中预测 UTS、焊缝硬度和 HAZ 硬度的多任务神经网络与堆叠集成学习的比较分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 准确预测焊接性能指标，如极限强度（UTS）、焊缝硬度和 HAZ 机械硬度，对于确保焊接构件的结构完整性和性能至关重要。多任务学习（MTL）是一种机器学习方法，其中一个模型被设计为同时处理多个相互关联的任务。与为每个任务分别训练独立模型不同，MTL 在任务之间共享表示，使其能够利用共同模式，同时保持任务特定差异。在本研究中，我们基于一个共享数据集，比较了两种先进的机器学习技术，即多任务神经网络（MTNN）和堆叠集成学习，用于预测这些参数。多任务神经网络（MTNN）是多任务学习（MTL）的一种特定类型，它使用深度神经网络架构同时处理多个相关任务。在 MTNN 中，不同任务共享部分隐藏层，同时具有任务特定的输出层。这种共享表示使模型能够学习跨任务的共同模式，同时保持任务特定输出。两种方法均采用 RMSE 和 R<sup>2</sup> 进行评估，以确定其预测精度和整体有效性。结果表明，该方法具有较强的预测能力，其 RMSE 分别为 UTS 的 0.1288、焊缝硬度的 0.0886、HAZ 硬度的 0.1125，而 R<sup>2</sup> 值分别为 0.6724、0.9215 和 0.8407。这表明它能够在相互关联的任务中很好地泛化。堆叠集成学习在单个任务的精度方面优于 MTL：UTS 的 RMSE 为 0.0263、R<sup>2</sup> 为 0.9863；焊缝硬度的 RMSE 为 0.0467、R<sup>2</sup> 为 0.9782；HAZ 硬度的 RMSE 为 0.1109、R<sup>2</sup> 为 0.8453。这些结果表明，集成方法在生成高精度、任务特定预测方面具有良好的能力。该比较揭示了两种方法之间的权衡。MTL 适用于任务相关且数据稀疏的场景，可实现高效训练和良好泛化；而堆叠集成在需要高精度、独立预测时表现更好。两种方法都显示出提升焊接应用预测能力的显著潜力，因而适合作为进一步研究混合模型的前奏，以结合两种方法的最佳特征。

infographic.key_insight: 堆叠集成学习在 UTS、焊缝硬度和 HAZ 硬度方面提供了最强的任务特定预测，而多任务神经网络则在相关焊接目标上表现出稳健的共享学习性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于焊接工艺优化，结果表明，当数据有限或任务耦合很强时，模型选择应在预测精度与共享学习带来的收益之间进行权衡。
method: 将多任务神经网络（共享隐藏层 + 任务特定输出）与堆叠集成学习进行比较。
预测三种焊接性能：UTS、焊缝硬度和 HAZ 硬度。
使用 RMSE 和 R² 评估性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在共享数据集上，堆叠方法在三个输出上都实现了更低的 RMSE 和更高的 R²，尤其在 UTS 和焊缝硬度方面提升显著，而 MTNN 在 HAZ 硬度上仍具有竞争力。
infographic.watch_item: 该比较依赖于数据集，因此如果焊接数据集较小、噪声较大，或迁移到新的材料/工艺条件，堆叠方法可能会过拟合或泛化较差。

title: Long-term corrosion behaviors and wear behavior of Fe-based amorphous coatings in different humidity environments
authors: Shuai Cui, Haimin Zhai, Zihan Feng, Xuqiang Li, Wensheng Li, Xiangjuan Fan
abstract: Fe-based amorphous coatings (Fe-based AMCs) were successfully prepared on Q235 carbon steel by detonation spray under different spraying parameters. The corrosion and tribology behaviors of coatings were systematically tested. The droplets show disk-like morphology with the highest circularity and expansion factor, which is crucial to reduce the defects of coatings and to form fine-lamellar-structures coatings with dense microstructure. A higher incidence of porosity defects in the coating is associated with reduced long-term corrosion resistance. Moreover, the tribo-chemical reactions between Si3N4 balls and water molecules play a significant role in wear behaviors for coating in different humidity conditions. The friction coefficient and wear rate of coatings decrease as the humidity conditions increase.

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed Fe-based amorphous coatings with disk-like, highly spread droplets form denser microstructures that improve corrosion and wear performance, while porosity undermines long-term protection.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing spray parameters and ambient humidity can directly tune coating durability for carbon-steel protection in corrosive and tribological service.
method: Detonation-sprayed Fe-based amorphous coatings onto Q235 carbon steel under different spray parameters
Compared coating microstructure, porosity, and droplet morphology
Tested long-term corrosion and tribology behavior under different humidity conditions
infographic.evidence_signal: Abstract-level results indicate that higher droplet circularity/expansion produces finer lamellar, denser coatings, and that friction coefficient and wear rate decrease as humidity increases.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends strongly on porosity control and environmental humidity, so results may not transfer directly to all service conditions or spray setups.
infographic.paper_title: Long-term corrosion behaviors and wear behavior of Fe-based amorphous coatings in different humidity environments

zh-Hans.title: 不同湿度环境下Fe基非晶涂层的长期腐蚀行为和磨损行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 采用爆炸喷涂在不同喷涂参数下成功制备了Q235碳钢上的Fe基非晶涂层（Fe-based AMCs）。系统测试了涂层的腐蚀和摩擦学行为。液滴呈盘状形貌，具有最高的圆形度和铺展因子，这对于减少涂层缺陷并形成具有致密微观结构的细层片状结构涂层至关重要。涂层中孔隙缺陷发生率较高与长期耐腐蚀性降低相关。此外，在不同湿度条件下，Si3N4球与水分子之间的摩擦化学反应对涂层的磨损行为起着重要作用。随着湿度条件升高，涂层的摩擦系数和磨损率降低。

infographic.key_insight: 爆炸喷涂Fe基非晶涂层的液滴呈盘状且铺展充分，可形成更致密的微观结构，从而提升耐腐蚀和耐磨性能；而孔隙会削弱长期防护能力。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化喷涂参数和环境湿度可直接调控涂层耐久性，用于碳钢在腐蚀和摩擦工况下的防护。
method: 在不同喷涂参数下将爆炸喷涂的Fe基非晶涂层制备于Q235碳钢上
比较涂层微观结构、孔隙率和液滴形貌
在不同湿度条件下测试长期腐蚀和摩擦学行为
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要结果表明，较高的液滴圆形度/铺展程度会形成更细小的层片状、更致密的涂层，且摩擦系数和磨损率随湿度升高而降低。
infographic.watch_item: 性能强烈依赖孔隙控制和环境湿度，因此结果可能无法直接迁移到所有服役条件或喷涂配置中。

title: Enhancing weld performance of AA2024-T351 using drilled-to-bossed geometry and deep learning prediction in direct drive friction welding
authors: Eyob Messele Sefene, Alemayehu Admas Abay, Akshansh Mishra, Assefa Asmare Tsegaw, William Gomez, Addisalem Desalegn Sisay
abstract: Abstract The growing demand for lightweight, high-strength materials in the aerospace and automotive industries has brought aluminium alloys such as AA2024-T351 into the spotlight due to their outstanding strength-to-weight ratio. However, achieving reliable joints in such alloys remains a significant challenge, particularly when using conventional welding techniques. To address this, the present study focuses on optimizing process parameters in Direct Drive Friction Welding (DDFW) for AA2024-T351. A novel drilled-to-bossed geometry, inspired by the traditional mortise-and-tenon joint, is introduced to enhance mechanical interlocking and improve weld integrity. Experimental trials were systematically designed using an L18 orthogonal array to evaluate both tensile and torsional strength. The experiments were conducted on a customized engine lathe, with friction pressure, forging pressure, spindle speed, faying surface geometry, and friction time selected as the controllable process parameters. In parallel, advanced deep learning models, including an ensemble residual network, a compact attention network, and an adaptive multiscale network, were implemented to predict ultimate tensile strength based on the welding conditions. The results revealed that the optimal parameter combination of 30 MPa friction pressure, 70 MPa forging pressure, 2200 rpm spindle speed, drilled-to-bossed geometry, and 4 min of friction time yielded exceptional mechanical performance, achieving a tensile strength of 538 MPa and torsional strength of 325 MPa. The drilled-to-bossed configuration demonstrated significantly higher joint strength compared to conventional flat-to-flat joints. Moreover, among the deep learning models, the ensemble residual network achieved the highest predictive accuracy with an R² value of approximately 0.81, effectively capturing the complex relationship between process parameters and weld strength.

infographic.key_insight: A drilled-to-bossed joint geometry combined with optimized DDFW settings substantially improves the weld strength of AA2024-T351, while deep learning can predict tensile performance from process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study offers a practical route to stronger lightweight aluminum joints for aerospace and automotive applications, where reliable high-strength welding is critical.
method: Used an L18 orthogonal array to test friction pressure, forging pressure, spindle speed, faying-surface geometry, and friction time.
Compared conventional flat-to-flat joints with a novel drilled-to-bossed geometry inspired by mortise-and-tenon mechanics.
Trained deep learning models, including an ensemble residual network, to predict ultimate tensile strength from welding conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The best condition achieved 538 MPa tensile strength and 325 MPa torsional strength, and the top model reached about R² = 0.81.
infographic.watch_item: The dataset appears limited to a designed experimental matrix, so model generalization beyond the tested welding window and material setup may be constrained.
infographic.paper_title: Enhancing weld performance of AA2024-T351 using drilled-to-bossed geometry and deep learning prediction in direct drive friction welding

zh-Hans.title: 采用钻孔至凸台几何形状和深度学习预测提升AA2024-T351在直接驱动摩擦焊中的焊接性能
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 随着航空航天和汽车工业对轻质高强材料的需求不断增长，铝合金（如AA2024-T351）因其优异的比强度而备受关注。然而，在此类合金中获得可靠接头仍然是一个重大挑战，尤其是在采用传统焊接技术时。为此，本研究聚焦于优化AA2024-T351直接驱动摩擦焊（DDFW）的工艺参数。借鉴传统榫卯连接形式，引入一种新颖的钻孔至凸台几何形状，以增强机械互锁并改善焊接完整性。实验采用L18正交表系统设计，以评估拉伸强度和扭转强度。实验在定制发动机车床上进行，并选取摩擦压力、顶锻压力、主轴转速、结合面几何形状和摩擦时间作为可控工艺参数。与此同时，采用包括集成残差网络、紧凑注意力网络和自适应多尺度网络在内的先进深度学习模型，根据焊接条件预测极限抗拉强度。结果表明，30 MPa摩擦压力、70 MPa顶锻压力、2200 rpm主轴转速、钻孔至凸台几何形状以及4 min摩擦时间的最佳参数组合获得了优异的力学性能，拉伸强度达到538 MPa，扭转强度达到325 MPa。与传统平面对平面接头相比，钻孔至凸台结构表现出显著更高的接头强度。此外，在深度学习模型中，集成残差网络取得了最高的预测精度，R²值约为0.81，有效捕捉了工艺参数与焊接强度之间的复杂关系。

infographic.key_insight: 钻孔至凸台接头几何形状与优化后的DDFW参数相结合，可显著提高AA2024-T351的焊接强度，而深度学习可以根据工艺参数预测拉伸性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究为航空航天和汽车应用中更强的轻质铝接头提供了一条实用路径，因为这些应用对可靠的高强度焊接至关重要。
method: 采用L18正交表测试摩擦压力、顶锻压力、主轴转速、结合面几何形状和摩擦时间。
将传统平面对平面接头与一种受榫卯力学启发的新型钻孔至凸台几何形状进行比较。
训练包括集成残差网络在内的深度学习模型，以根据焊接条件预测极限抗拉强度。
infographic.evidence_signal: 最佳工况实现了538 MPa的拉伸强度和325 MPa的扭转强度，表现最好的模型达到约R² = 0.81。
infographic.watch_item: 该数据集似乎仅限于一个设计好的实验矩阵，因此模型对所测试焊接窗口和材料设定之外情况的泛化能力可能受限。

title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings
authors: Xinran Li, Yi-Xiang Wang, Maxingwang Lu, Yongchao Fang
abstract: To solve the susceptibility of TC4 titanium alloys to high-temperature oxidation and subsequent performance degradation, AlCuFe quasicrystalline (QC) coatings were successfully fabricated via detonation spraying (DS) as a functional protective barrier. The oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and mechanical stability of the coating system were systematically investigated at 450°C in an atmospheric environment for up to 250 h. The results indicate that the oxidation kinetics strictly obey the parabolic growth law, yielding a steady-state parabolic rate constant ( k p ) of 1.83 × 10 −2 mg 2 ⋅ cm −4 ⋅ h −1 . Throughout the service period, the coating exhibits a significant “thermal hardening” effect, with the surface microhardness increasing from an initial 491 HV 0.2 to a final value of 665.2 HV 0.2 (a 35.5% increment). Phase evolution is characterized by an initial thermally induced ordering of metastable regions (0–3 h) followed by the gradual decomposition of the icosahedral (I) phase into approximant phases (β, τ, and λ) driven by the Al-depletion effect. Notably, the increased density of phase boundaries and intermetallic interfaces within the multi-phase network effectively sustains the mechanical performance despite the decline in the primary QC fraction. This study demonstrates that DS-AlCuFe coatings provide a reliable structural evolution pathway for the long-term high-temperature protection of titanium alloys.

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings oxidize slowly at 450°C while transforming into a more stable multiphase microstructure that preserves hardening over time.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The coating offers a promising high-temperature protective barrier for TC4 titanium alloys, improving oxidation resistance and maintaining mechanical stability during long-term exposure.
method: Fabricated AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings by detonation spraying (DS)
Aged/oxidized coatings in air at 450°C for up to 250 h
Tracked oxidation kinetics, phase evolution, and microhardness over time
infographic.evidence_signal: The oxidation followed a parabolic law with kp = 1.83 × 10^-22 mg²·cm^-4·h^-1, while microhardness increased from 491 HV0.2 to 665.2 HV0.2 after 250 h.
infographic.watch_item: The coating’s long-term performance may depend on controlling Al depletion and phase-boundary evolution, which could vary with service temperature, atmosphere, and spray quality.
infographic.paper_title: High-temperature oxidation kinetics and microstructural evolution of detonation-sprayed AlCuFe quasicrystalline coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆轰喷涂AlCuFe准晶涂层的高温氧化动力学与微观结构演化
zh-Hans.abstract: 为解决TC4钛合金易发生高温氧化及其后续性能退化的问题，采用爆轰喷涂（DS）成功制备了AlCuFe准晶（QC）涂层，作为一种功能性保护屏障。在大气环境下于450°C下对该涂层体系的氧化动力学、相演化和力学稳定性进行了最长250 h的系统研究。结果表明，氧化动力学严格遵循抛物线生长定律，稳态抛物线速率常数（kp）为1.83 × 10−2 mg2⋅cm−4⋅h−1。在整个服役期间，涂层表现出显著的“热硬化”效应，表面显微硬度由初始的491 HV0.2提高到最终的665.2 HV0.2（增幅35.5%）。相演化特征表现为：首先在热诱导下稳定区发生有序化（0–3 h），随后在Al贫化效应驱动下，二十面体（I）相逐渐分解为近似相（β、τ和λ）。值得注意的是，多相网络中相界面和金属间界面的密度增加，在主准晶相含量下降的情况下仍能有效维持力学性能。该研究表明，DS-AlCuFe涂层为钛合金的长期高温防护提供了一条可靠的结构演化路径。

infographic.key_insight: 爆轰喷涂AlCuFe准晶涂层在450°C下缓慢氧化，同时转变为更稳定的多相微观结构，并随时间保持硬化效果。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该涂层为TC4钛合金提供了有前景的高温保护屏障，可提高抗氧化性并在长期暴露过程中保持力学稳定性。
method: 采用爆轰喷涂（DS）制备AlCuFe准晶涂层
在450°C空气中对涂层进行老化/氧化处理，最长250 h
随时间跟踪氧化动力学、相演化和显微硬度
infographic.evidence_signal: 氧化过程符合抛物线规律，kp = 1.83 × 10^-22 mg²·cm^-4·h^-1，而显微硬度在250 h后由491 HV0.2增加至665.2 HV0.2。
infographic.watch_item: 涂层的长期性能可能取决于对Al贫化和相界演化的控制，而这些因素可能随服役温度、气氛和喷涂质量而变化。

title: Surface Characteristics of Titanium Based Coatings Obtained by Detonation Spraying Under Various Process Conditions
authors: Vyacheslav Sirota, Sergey Savotchenko, Valeriya Strokova, Daniil Podgornyi, Marina Kovaleva
abstract: The surface properties of metal-ceramic coatings based on titanium dioxide are described in dependence on the detonation spraying conditions. It is found that such properties as surface roughness, surface thickness and its hydrophobicity can be controlled in the production process by selecting certain values of the technological parameters of the spraying process. The optimal values of the technological parameters of detonation spraying, ensuring maximum hydrophobicity of the produced coatings are determined. The roughness of the coating surface and the coating thickness depend on the speed of the nozzle passage in accordance with the inverse power law. The roughness and the contact angle depend on spray distance in accordance with a parabolic law. New equations are obtained that can be useful for predicting the characteristics of the coating surface, as well as for determining the optimal mode of spraying the coating, ensuring its best hydrophobicity.
venue: Iranian Journal of Materials Science and Engineering

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed titanium dioxide-based coatings can have their roughness, thickness, and hydrophobicity tuned by adjusting process parameters such as nozzle speed and spray distance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study provides practical process-parameter guidance and predictive equations for optimizing coating performance in surface engineering applications.
method: Varied detonation spraying conditions for titanium-based metal-ceramic coatings
Measured surface roughness, coating thickness, and water contact angle
Fit empirical relationships linking nozzle speed and spray distance to surface properties
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports identified scaling laws: roughness and thickness follow an inverse power law with nozzle passage speed, while roughness and contact angle vary with spray distance in a parabolic form.
infographic.watch_item: The conclusions appear based on process-specific empirical fits, so the equations may require revalidation before use on different materials, geometries, or spraying systems.
infographic.paper_title: Surface Characteristics of Titanium Based Coatings Obtained by Detonation Spraying Under Various Process Conditions

zh-Hans.title: 通过爆炸喷涂在各种工艺条件下获得的钛基涂层表面特性
zh-Hans.abstract: 描述了基于二氧化钛的金属陶瓷涂层表面性能随爆炸喷涂条件变化的规律。研究发现，表面粗糙度、表面厚度及其疏水性等性能可通过在生产过程中选择喷涂工艺参数的特定取值来控制。确定了爆炸喷涂工艺参数的最佳取值，以确保所制备涂层具有最大的疏水性。涂层表面粗糙度和涂层厚度依赖于喷嘴通过速度，且符合反幂律。粗糙度和接触角依赖于喷涂距离，且符合抛物线规律。获得了新的方程，可用于预测涂层表面的特性，以及确定喷涂涂层的最佳喷涂模式，从而确保其最佳疏水性。

infographic.key_insight: 通过调整喷嘴速度和喷涂距离等工艺参数，爆炸喷涂的二氧化钛基涂层可调控其粗糙度、厚度和疏水性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究为表面工程应用中的涂层性能优化提供了实用的工艺参数指导和预测方程。
method: 改变钛基金属陶瓷涂层的爆炸喷涂条件
测量表面粗糙度、涂层厚度和水接触角
拟合喷嘴速度和喷涂距离与表面性质之间的经验关系
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了已识别的尺度律：粗糙度和厚度随喷嘴通过速度呈反幂律变化，而粗糙度和接触角随喷涂距离呈抛物线形式变化。
infographic.watch_item: 这些结论似乎基于特定工艺条件下的经验拟合，因此在不同材料、几何形状或喷涂系统上使用前，这些方程可能需要重新验证。

title: Effects of electron beam welding on the microstructure and impact properties of three reconstituted steels
authors: HU Minglei, HU Bin, ZHANG Wei, LIU Xiaoou, DAI Kunjie, NI Xiaoqing
abstract: Specimen reconstitution technology is important for the in-service safety of reactor pressure vessels (RPVs) in nuclear power plants. To verify the feasibility of electron beam welding for the restructured specimens, the electron beam welding to restructure the 16MND5, 10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN, and X6NiCrTiMoVB 25-15-2 Charpy impact specimens for three kinds of steels was adopted, the microstructure and mechanical properties of the restructured specimens were characterized, and the Vickers hardness and impact toughness of the specimens were tested by non-destructive flaw detection, optical microscopy, and scanning electron microscopy. The results show that the microstructure of these three steels in weld zone is relatively dense, and no obvious crack defects occur. The welding quality of 10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN restructured specimens is the best, and the mechanical properties are relatively close to those of the original specimens, demonstrating that the electron beam welding has the good application potential of reconstitution in nuclear power field.

infographic.key_insight: Electron beam welding can successfully reconstitute Charpy impact specimens for reactor-pressure-vessel steels, producing dense weld zones with no obvious cracking and near-original mechanical behavior in the best case.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This supports specimen reconstitution for nuclear materials testing, helping preserve safety-relevant mechanical evaluation when original material is limited or unavailable.
method: Reconstituted Charpy impact specimens of 16MND5, 10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN, and X6NiCrTiMoVB 25-15-2 steels using electron beam welding.
Characterized weld-zone microstructure with optical microscopy and scanning electron microscopy.
Assessed hardness, impact toughness, and flaw presence to compare restructured specimens with original ones.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports non-destructive flaw detection plus microscopy and mechanical tests, showing a dense weld zone without obvious cracks and the closest property match for 10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on specific steel grades and specimen-scale reconstitution, so broader process transfer to other alloys or larger components may require additional validation.
infographic.paper_title: Effects of electron beam welding on the microstructure and impact properties of three reconstituted steels

zh-Hans.title: 电子束焊接对三种重构钢微观组织和冲击性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 试样重构技术对于核电站反应堆压力容器（RPV）的在役安全至关重要。为验证电子束焊接用于重构试样的可行性，采用电子束焊接对三种钢材的16MND5、10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN和X6NiCrTiMoVB 25-15-2 Charpy冲击试样进行重构，并通过无损探伤、光学显微镜和扫描电子显微镜对重构试样的微观组织和力学性能进行了表征，同时测试了试样的维氏硬度和冲击韧性。结果表明，这三种钢在焊接区的微观组织较为致密，未出现明显裂纹缺陷。10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN重构试样的焊接质量最佳，其力学性能与原始试样较为接近，表明电子束焊接在核电领域的重构应用具有良好的应用潜力。

infographic.key_insight: 电子束焊接可以成功重构反应堆压力容器钢的Charpy冲击试样，形成致密、无明显开裂的焊接区，在最佳情况下其力学行为接近原始材料。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为核材料试验中的试样重构提供了支持，有助于在原始材料有限或不可获得时保留与安全相关的力学评估。
method: 采用电子束焊接对16MND5、10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN和X6NiCrTiMoVB 25-15-2钢的Charpy冲击试样进行重构。
采用光学显微镜和扫描电子显微镜表征焊接区微观组织。
评估硬度、冲击韧性和缺陷情况，并将重构试样与原始试样进行比较。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报道了无损探伤、显微观察和力学测试，显示焊接区致密且无明显裂纹，其中10Cr12Ni3Mo2VN的性能匹配最接近原始试样。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于特定钢种和试样尺度的重构，因此将该工艺推广到其他合金或更大部件时，可能需要进一步验证。
